name: Albanian Burger Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, minced garlic, egg, soaked and squeezed bread, onion, salt, black pepper, and minced mint in a large bowl.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
3. Form the mixture into 4 oblong patties.
4. Heat a lightly greased skillet over medium heat.
5. Cook the patties for 8 to 10 minutes on each side until they reach your desired level of doneness.
6. Serve the burgers on hot plates.
7. Garnish with additional mint leaves, if desired.
